relabelled_senses.definition: With certainty; with exact or definitive knowledge.
By reverse charge; a telephone call or transmission for which the charges are billed to the recipient rather than the caller (collect call).
Indicative of rivalry or competition; amounting to competitive action between parties.
With thoroughness and care; performed meticulously and completely.
A regional or colloquial expression of uncertain or variable meaning; usage and sense depend on local dialect.
Treated with lavish comfort, luxury, and attentive care; given privileges and amenities associated with high status.
Reluctantly; with unwillingness.
Located out of the way; not conveniently situated.
On piecework; paid or employed by the amount of work completed rather than by time.
As of today; at the present time.
All over the place; everywhere and in all directions.
Without restriction or limit; as much as one wants (used of food, drink, supplies, etc.).
Made available for use; placed at the service of someone or a group (of objects, vehicles, funds, etc.).
Penniless; lacking money or financial resources.
With great difficulty; scarcely; barely managing to do or obtain something.
It is better to let an enemy who is retreating go unhindered than to pursue them; do not interfere with an adversary's withdrawal.
To flee or depart hastily; to make a quick getaway to avoid capture, trouble, or responsibility.
In secret; without the knowledge of others; clandestinely.
Secretly and furtively; on the sly, often implying repeated or surreptitious actions.
In very large quantities; plentifully; in abundance.
